Mean of General and Essential Equipments/Instruments in %age 97.59

Note: The mean of total percentage of available Essential instruments and General instruments will be considered for recommendation as the Miscellaneous instruments mostly covers the things like Glasswares, Buckets, Mug, Cotton balls etc.

Observation on functionality of all OPD's. : The Hospital has Separate Registration Counter for OPD and IPD. Screening OPD, Kayachiktsa, Panchakarma, Shalya, Shalakya (Netra), Shalakya (Mukha), Kaumarabhritya, Prasooti Tantra & Stree Roga and Visha Chikitsa along with Casualty. All the patients are registered in the Central OPD and the HMIS software. Online HMIS, Central OPD and Respective Departmental OPD registers were cross matched and verified for random patients. Random Verification of OPD records were done and found satisfactory. Vishachikitsa OPD was functional with Agadatantra consultant. The Athyayika OPD had all equipments with working oxygen supply through, movable O2 concentrator, Emergency medicines and first-aid kit were present. ECG machine was functional. One Ambulance was found with hospital name. The central dispensary or Pharmacy was stocked. The pharmacy has maintained IPD and OPD dispensing register, the Indenting was done with Indent book, the central stock is maintained manually and stocks are verified every month. Data available were cross verified with purchase indent and bills. The medicine dispensing register form the pharmacy was compared with that of OPD and past records were also randomly verified and found to be correct.

Observation on functionality of all Hospital. : The hospital is 100 bedded, with separate wards for male and female Patients. The beds are numbered. All the 100 beds are of general ward category and well ventilated. Panchakrma theatre is centrally located and has separate section for Male and Female. Panchakarma block has different rooms for Vamana, Virechana, Basti and Raktamokshana. All these rooms have common washroom. The OPD and IP data on different procedures are maintained in registers. Data was verified and random case record were verified with central OPD and IPD register.The Hospital has on call anaesthetist for all OT procedure. All the modern Doctors are on call visit to the hospital in need. Major OT is equipped with Instrument. The OT complex has separate Autoclave, scrubbing, dressing sections, all registers of fumigation, sterilisation, autoclaving, swab test reports, were found adequate. NICU is available with radiant warmer and there is Phototherapy instrument. Clinical Laboratory is functional with facility. Radiology department has a 100MA digital portable X Ray Machine. AREB licence of Xray section is available, However, TLD badge is not available. ECG machine is available in Casualty. Physiotherapy section was functional. No ICU is available in the hospital. Overall the hospital was found to be functional. NICU Register, Immunisation register, USG, Ambulance, Death Record and Intern Duty rosters not available.

Observation on Conditions of Deparments. : The College has presently departments of 1st, 2nd and 3rd Professional BAMS. All the departments were functional. Two batch students were found in the class rooms with ongoing lecturer, about other students we had been told that, one batch was on vacation and other batch was facing exams. Samhita department does not have a Language laboratory, but procurement is in progress. Kriya department has all the instruments as per the Part 1 filled same was counted and found correct. The New Instruments as per MESA&R 2024 is in progress. Dissection theatre is located in next to Rachana Museum and has the tables and storage as part 1 along with Embalming Machine. There were one cadaver in the dissection theatre with upper limb and thorax been dissected. Dravya guna department have museum with all charts, modules and laboratory facility. Rasa Shatra & Bhaishaya Kalpana department have museum and department library books with all chart, modules and specimens. RSBk has separate Rasa Shala for practical classes with well equipped analytical laboratory equipments. Roga Nidana & Vikrita Vignana department had charts, models in spacious museum with computers along with printers attached were found. Swastavrutha and Yoga department have spacious hall with yoga matts and with one yoga staff present. Agada tantra & Vidhi Vaidyaka department have museum with well equipped and staff were present. Students interaction was done by the visitor. The classroom were found well and good with facility of Audio Visual aids, no any grievance recorded from the students. Accession register of central library was verified and found to be correct. Library has seating capacity of 120 students and digital library has 12 computers with Internet facility, same was verified. Herbal garden is in college campus with 4110 Sqmtr of space with 251 species and 1156 plants were found. The Clinical Departments of the College Kayachiktsa, Panchakarma, Prassoti Stree Roga, Kaumarabhritya, Shalya and Shalakya Tantra have been established with necessary charts, models and books as per the requirement. The Boys hostel and the girls hostel is located near to the college within the campus. CCTV monitoring system is adequate. The mess is located in the college campus with adequate seating capacity.

Overall opinion about Hospital/Colleges. : Overall both the college and Hospital is functional.The College has 52 full time and 2 Part time Faculties (1 Biostatistician and 1 Yoga teacher). However in Part 1 only 42 are linked. 5 linked and 2 non linked faculties were absent on the day of visitation. Aadhar Based Biometric Attendance (Thumb) has been Started from 1st April for teaching Staff and Iris based from 12/04/2025. The Simultation models are present in clinical departments. The Infrastructural facility of the college and hospital is as per the recommendations of MSR 2016 and provision for additional infrastructure and equipments and Instruments requirements as per MSE 2024 have been started by the Management. Hospital has a fully equipped OPD’s, IPD’s, Emergency Casualty, Ambulance. The total College non teaching staff eligible are 45 among which 3 were absent and among 107 Hospital staff 9 were on informed leave. Majority of the College Teaching staff are residing in the staff quarters provided by the college.

Supportive documents/points on the lancunae. : Except Physiotherapist, No Modern Medical staff was present on on the day of visitation, Documentation in hospital needs improvement especially in getting lab reports as early as possible. PTSR and Shalya OPD need to be optimised for better examination facility of patients, space is available some rearrangement is required to be made. Language lab should be setup with proper software. Physiotherapy section has limited equipments.

Observation regarding deficience observed by visitors. : There is deficiency of 2 higher faculties in Kaumarabhritya Department. Among the 54 faculties of the college, 11 faculties have not been linked with the college due to technical reasons as informed by the principal during submission of Part 1. However, after submission of the part 1, Professor in Kayachiktsa Dr. Kamlesh Mutha with teachers code AYKC01861 and One lecturer in RSBK Dr. Niveditha Deshbrata with teachers code AYRB01928 has been linked to college and the details

have been attached in Annexure I. There are no teachers in Shalakaya Tantra Department who has been linked to College Part 1, however during verification Dr. Dinesh Dulhani Professor and Dr. Rani Patle, lecturer were present physically in the college. One Reader Dr. Rajeev Kopulwar was on informed leave. Sanskrit Teacher Ms. Chitralekha Panchabuddhe who does not have teachers code was present during Physical verification. As per the information provided by principal the staff has applied for fresh Teachers code. The details of the same has been detailed as undertaking in Annexure 1. One newly joined faculty (Date of joining 15/4/2025), Dr. Arun Kalihari Asst. professor in Kriya Sharira was physical present but not linked in Part 1 and does not have teachers code.

Any other observation. : Dr. Pankaj Barapatre who was working as Assistant professor of Shalya Tantra with teachers code AYST02163 has been relived from the post and appointed as DMS with effect from 12th March 2025. The notification of the same has been attached in Annexure III. Among the 45 College Non Teaching Staff, 3 staff namely Mr. Dharmendra Thakur, Mr. Kamlesh Dhaikar and MS. Thaiseen Ghani who were on leave were present for Photo and verification. Additionally 3 staff Ms. Kajal Bhoyar, Mr. Yogendra Thakur, and Mukesh Marko who were present in college attendance register were not present in Photograph and didn’t appear for verification. 1 staff Mr. Jaydeep Mathe was not available in the photo, but was present for verification. The details of the same has been mentioned as undertaking by principal in Annexure II. Among 107, 9 staff Mr. Geetha Pardy (Nurse Panchakarma), Mr. Kuldeep Gharde (Ward Boy), Ms. Lucky Bopche (Data Entry Operator), Ms. Basanti Parade (Aayya), Mr. Sandeep Bhorjar (Peon), Ms.Roshni Meshram (Aayya), Mr. Mehboob Khan (Electrician), Ms. Monita Gajbhiye (Aayya) and Mr. Ravi Kumar Lilhare (Electrician) were on informed leave.
